## LibraryRuntime.IIngredient.isAlcohol() method

Returns true if this is an alcohol ingredient. When true, alcohol-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isAlcohol(): this is IAlcoholIngredient;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IAlcoholIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.ialcoholingredient.md)
